positive: Minimalist geometric portrait of a howling arctic fox silhouetted against a vibrant, stylized nebula backdrop. The fox should be the strong central subject, depicted with sharp, clean lines and powerful negative space around its form. The nebula colors should be deep indigo, electric teal, and luminous magenta, creating a high-contrast, ethereal glow. The style must be inspired by Art Nouveau geometry and celestial science art, resembling a blend of Alphonse Mucha's flow with modern vaporwave aesthetics. Composition must be centered and suitable for all-over apparel printing, with clean edges and visible separation between subject and background. Ink saturation should be high, mimicking screen print quality. Perfect symmetry, vector graphic feel, smooth gradient transitions, volumetric lighting, highly detailed, 4k print resolution.
